jobs.title: Manager, Business Development - Platform Partnerships
jobs.content: <p><strong>About Fubo:</strong></p><p>FuboTV Inc. is a consumer-first live TV streaming company that is defining the future of TV.</p><p>Ranked among Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies. Fubo owns Hulu + Live TV (entertainment), Fubo (sports) and Molotov (entertainment and sports), which stream in markets around the globe.</p><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p><p>We are seeking a Manager, Business Development - Platform Partnerships to join our Business Development team. This role will help support Fubo's subscriber growth through partnerships across multiple major distribution platforms&nbsp;such as Apple, Roku, SamsungTV, and Amazon.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Backend
jobs.content: <p><strong>About Fubo:</strong></p><p>FuboTV Inc. is a consumer-first live TV streaming company.</p><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p><p>We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer, Backend to join our Technology team. You'll architect, build, and operate the backend systems that power Fubo's streaming experience for millions of subscribers across CTV, Smart TV, mobile, and web surfaces. Strong expertise in Go, Kotlin, or Java is preferred &mdash; with experience operating high-throughput stateless microservices in production.</p>
